sqlMap.sql: series se left join category_series cs using(se_id) left join category ca on cs_ca_id = ca.ca_id

left join ( select distinct on(se_id) * from series se left join category_series cs using(se_id) left join category ca on cs_ca_id=ca.ca_id where se_sid is not null and se_sid!='' ) as se_join using (se_sid)
sqlMap.insert: insert into series ( se_id,se_name,se_name2,se_order,se_text,se_text2,se_pdf1,se_pdf2,se_pdf3, se_pdf1_page,se_pdf2_page,se_pdf3_page,se_cad1,se_cad2,se_cad3, se_img1,se_img2,se_img3, se_link1,se_link2,se_link3,se_link4,se_link5, se_link6,se_link7,se_link8,se_link9,se_link10, se_link11,se_link12,se_link13,se_link14,se_link15, se_link16,se_link17,se_link18,se_link19,se_link20, se_active,ctime,mtime,by,ca_id, se_sid,se_contain,se_more,se_webcatalog,se_lang,se_search_idx,se_keyword,se_opt1,se_catpans_txt,se_hascad3d) values ( #id#,#name#,#name2#,#order#,#text#,#text2#,#pdf1#,#pdf2#,#pdf3#,#pdf1_page#,#pdf2_page#,#pdf3_page#, #cad1#,#cad2#,#cad3#,#img1#,#img2#,#img3#, #link1#,#link2#,#link3#,#link4#,#link5#, #link6#,#link7#,#link8#,#link9#,#link10#, #link11#,#link12#,#link13#,#link14#,#link15#, #link16#,#link17#,#link18#,#link19#,#link20#, #active#,#ctime#,#mtime#,#by#,#ca_id#, #sid#,#contain#,#more#,#webcatalog#,#lang#,#search_idx#,#keyword#,#opt1#,#catpans_txt#,#hascad3d#)
sqlMap.update:
update series set se_name=#name#, se_name2=#name2#, se_order=#order#, se_text=#text#, se_text2=#text2#, se_pdf1=#pdf1#, se_pdf2=#pdf2#, se_pdf3=#pdf3#, se_pdf1_page=#pdf1_page#, se_pdf2_page=#pdf2_page#, se_pdf3_page=#pdf3_page#, se_cad1=#cad1#, se_cad2=#cad2#, se_cad3=#cad3#, se_img1=#img1#, se_img2=#img2#, se_img3=#img3#, se_link1=#link1#, se_link2=#link2#, se_link3=#link3#, se_link4=#link4#, se_link5=#link5#, se_link6=#link6#, se_link7=#link7#, se_link8=#link8#, se_link9=#link9#, se_link10=#link10#, se_link11=#link11#, se_link12=#link12#, se_link13=#link13#, se_link14=#link14#, se_link15=#link15#, se_link16=#link16#, se_link17=#link17#, se_link18=#link18#, se_link19=#link19#, se_link20=#link20#,
se_active=#active#, ctime=#ctime#, mtime=#mtime#, by=#by# ,ca_id=#ca_id#, se_sid=#sid#, se_contain=#contain#, se_more=#more#, se_webcatalog=#webcatalog# ,se_lang=#lang# , se_search_idx=#search_idx#, se_keyword=#keyword#, se_opt1=#opt1#, se_catpans_txt=#catpans_txt# , se_hascad3d=#hascad3d#, se_has_cy_custom=#has_cy_custom#, se_has_cy_om=#has_cy_om# where se_id=#id#
update series set se_keyword=#keyword# where se_id=#id#
update series set se_order=#order# where se_id=#id#
update series set se_hascad3d=#hascad3d# where se_id=#id#
update series set ca_id=#dst_ca_id# where ca_id=#src_ca_id#
sqlMap.select: select * from where ca.ca_id=#ca_id# order by cs_order
select * from where ca_parent_id=#ca_id# order by cs_order
select * from where se_id=#id# order by cs_id
select * from where se_sid=#id# order by cs_id
select * from where se_sid=#sid# and se_id!=#id#
sqlMap.insert:
insert into seriesmap (se_id,sm_type,sm_name,sm_cname,sm_order,sm_active,ctime,mtime,by) values (#se_id#, #type#, #name#, #cname#, #order#,#active#,#ctime#,#mtime#,#by#)
select last_value as value from seriesmap_sm_id_seq
sqlMap.update: update seriesmap set se_id=#se_id#, sm_type=#type#, sm_name=#name#, sm_cname=#cname#, sm_order=#order#,sm_active=#active#, mtime=#mtime#,by=#by# where sm_id=#id#
sqlMap.select: select * from seriesmap where se_id=#id# order by sm_order
select sm_cname from seriesmap where sm_name=#name# limit 1

select distinct on (se_id)* from (
select * from series se left join category_series cs using(se_id) left join category ca on cs_ca_id=ca.ca_id
se_id=#se_ids[]#
ca_name~*#category_prefix#
order by cs_ca_id
) as se1 where se_id!=0
limit #limit# offset #offset#

select * from (
select distinct on (se_id) * from ( select * from series se left join category_series cs using(se_id) left join category ca on cs_ca_id=ca.ca_id join
( select se_id from item i left join series using(se_id)
$cname$~*#keywords[]#
(se_sid~*#keywords[]# or se_name~*#keywords[]# or se_name2~*#keywords[]# or se_text~*#keywords[]# or c1~*#keywords[]# or c2~*#keywords[]# or c3~*#keywords[]# or c4~*#keywords[]# or c5~*#keywords[]# or c6~*#keywords[]# or c7~*#keywords[]# or c8~*#keywords[]# or c9~*#keywords[]# or c10~*#keywords[]# or c11~*#keywords[]# or c12~*#keywords[]# or c13~*#keywords[]# or c14~*#keywords[]# or c15~*#keywords[]# or c16~*#keywords[]# or c17~*#keywords[]# or c18~*#keywords[]# or c19~*#keywords[]# or c20~*#keywords[]# or c21~*#keywords[]# or c22~*#keywords[]# or c23~*#keywords[]# or c24~*#keywords[]# or c25~*#keywords[]# or c26~*#keywords[]# or c27~*#keywords[]# or c28~*#keywords[]# or c29~*#keywords[]# or c30~*#keywords[]# or c31~*#keywords[]# or c32~*#keywords[]# or c33~*#keywords[]# or c34~*#keywords[]# or c35~*#keywords[]# or c36~*#keywords[]# or c37~*#keywords[]# or c38~*#keywords[]# or c39~*#keywords[]# or c40~*#keywords[]# or c41~*#keywords[]# or c42~*#keywords[]# or c43~*#keywords[]# or c44~*#keywords[]# or c45~*#keywords[]# or c46~*#keywords[]# or c47~*#keywords[]# or c48~*#keywords[]# or c49~*#keywords[]# or c50~*#keywords[]#)
se_lang = #lang#
group by se_id) as se2
using(se_id) ) as se3
where ca_parent_id=#ca_id#
) as se4 where se_id!=0
order by
se_search_idx desc ,
se_order asc
limit #limit# offset #offset#

select * from (
select distinct on (se_id) * from ( select *,ca_parent.ca_order as parent_order from series se left join category_series cs using(se_id) left join category ca on cs_ca_id=ca.ca_id left join category ca_parent on ca.ca_parent_id=ca_parent.ca_id join
( select se_id from item i left join series using(se_id)
(se_sid~*#keywords[]# or se_name~*#keywords[]# or se_name2~*#keywords[]# or se_text~*#keywords[]# or c1~*#keywords[]# or c2~*#keywords[]# or c3~*#keywords[]# or c4~*#keywords[]# or c5~*#keywords[]# or c6~*#keywords[]# or c7~*#keywords[]# or c8~*#keywords[]# or c9~*#keywords[]# or c10~*#keywords[]# or c11~*#keywords[]# or c12~*#keywords[]# or c13~*#keywords[]# or c14~*#keywords[]# or c15~*#keywords[]# or c16~*#keywords[]# or c17~*#keywords[]# or c18~*#keywords[]# or c19~*#keywords[]# or c20~*#keywords[]# or c21~*#keywords[]# or c22~*#keywords[]# or c23~*#keywords[]# or c24~*#keywords[]# or c25~*#keywords[]# or c26~*#keywords[]# or c27~*#keywords[]# or c28~*#keywords[]# or c29~*#keywords[]# or c30~*#keywords[]# or c31~*#keywords[]# or c32~*#keywords[]# or c33~*#keywords[]# or c34~*#keywords[]# or c35~*#keywords[]# or c36~*#keywords[]# or c37~*#keywords[]# or c38~*#keywords[]# or c39~*#keywords[]# or c40~*#keywords[]# or c41~*#keywords[]# or c42~*#keywords[]# or c43~*#keywords[]# or c44~*#keywords[]# or c45~*#keywords[]# or c46~*#keywords[]# or c47~*#keywords[]# or c48~*#keywords[]# or c49~*#keywords[]# or c50~*#keywords[]#)
(se_name2~*#keywords[]#)
group by se_id) as se2
using(se_id) ) as se3
cs_ca_id=#ca_ids[]#
and se_lang = #lang#
) as se4 where se_id!=0
order by
se_search_idx desc, parent_order asc,
cs_order asc
se_name2 , se_id
limit #limit# offset #offset#

select * from series se left join category_series cs using(se_id) left join category ca on cs_ca_id = ca.ca_id
where cs_ca_id=#ca_id# order by cs_order
limit #limit# offset #offset#
sqlMap.update: update category_series set cs_order=#cs_order# where cs_ca_id=#cs_ca_id# and se_id=#id#
sqlMap.delete: delete from category_series where cs_ca_id=#cs_ca_id# and se_id=#id#;
